content: Phase 1: Get design guidelines from design_agent (premium nonprofit + GSAP)
Phase 1: Research GSAP + React Router ScrollTrigger lifecycle best practices
Phase 1: Source high-quality stock images per program theme
Phase 2: Build routing + shared layout (top bar, navbar, footer)
Phase 2: Build Home page (cinematic IA + GSAP motion system)
Phase 2: Build Programs overview + all program detail pages
Phase 2: Build International, Mission, Get Involved, Donate pages
Phase 2: Apply global GSAP motion (reveals, parallax, navbar, micro-interactions)
Phase 2: Validate motion + UI via screenshots, fix jitter/perf
